why.title: A web agency that measures impact, not output.
why.subtitle: We refuse approximation. Every design decision, every line of code and every keyword is chosen to serve your business goals.

items.title: Obsessive performance
items.body: Lighthouse score of 100, Core Web Vitals in the green, sub-second load times. Speed is both an SEO and a sales lever.

items.title: SEO baked into design
items.body: Semantic structure, Schema.org markup, internal linking, multilingual hreflang: SEO is built in, never bolted on.

items.title: Design that converts
items.body: Modern aesthetics aren't enough. Every section is engineered to guide visitors towards the action that matters to you.

items.title: Transparent partnership
items.body: A single point of contact, a clear timeline, monthly reporting. You always know where your project and your ROI stand.

process.title: A proven process, with no nasty surprises
process.subtitle: A four-step methodology to deliver a high-performing website and lasting SEO results.

steps.title: Strategic framing
steps.body: Discovery workshop, audit of the existing site, competitor research and target keyword definition. We lay solid foundations before the first mockup.

steps.title: Design & architecture
steps.body: UX/UI mockups, information architecture, SEO sitemap and collaborative validation through interactive prototypes.

steps.title: Development & technical SEO
steps.body: Modern Next.js development, pixel-perfect implementation, Schema.org markup, multilingual sitemap and optimised performance.

steps.title: Launch & growth
steps.body: Go-live, ranking monitoring, monthly SEO iterations, conversion rate optimisation and transparent reporting.

items.quote: Our organic traffic tripled in six months and we're finally ranking first on our strategic keywords. The team is responsive and skilled.
items.author: Sophie Laurent

items.quote: A modern, lightning-fast and perfectly optimised website. Agency met every commitment, on time and on budget.
items.author: Julien Morel

items.quote: Clear process, gorgeous design, killer SEO. Our qualified leads doubled in the first quarter.
items.author: Clara Benedetti

items.q: How much does a professional website cost?
items.a: A tailor-made showcase site starts around €4,500, an e-commerce store from €9,000. Every quote is built after a free framing call to reflect your scope, content volume and technical complexity.

items.q: How long does it take to deliver a website?
items.a: A showcase site is delivered in 4 to 6 weeks, a more complex project in 8 to 12 weeks. We work in sprints with full visibility on every milestone.
Technical SEO (structure, tags, performance, Schema.org, sitemap) is built into every website project. Editorial SEO and link building are offered as an optional monthly retainer.

items.q: Do you work with international clients?
items.a: Yes. We support clients across Europe, Spain and Canada. Multilingual mastery (hreflang, translated content, local SEO) is at the heart of our projects.

items.q: Will I own the website after launch?
items.a: Absolutely. You own the source code and the content. We train your team and stay available for any future need.

cta.title: Ready to step it up?
cta.subtitle: Let's talk about your project. Free SEO audit, quote within 48 hours.

content.intro: Agency is a French web agency specialised in professional website creation and Google SEO. We design high-performing digital experiences for SMBs and scale-ups that want to turn their site into a true acquisition engine. From SEO strategy to UX/UI design, from Next.js development to post-launch monitoring, we own every step with uncompromising technical and aesthetic standards.
paragraphs: A modern website is no longer a static brochure. It is a business asset that has to attract, convince and convert. At Agency we craft websites that combine careful design, an SEO-friendly architecture and outstanding performance. Our teams master the latest technologies — Next.js, React, TypeScript, headless CMS — to deliver a durable, secure and easy-to-maintain platform.

Google SEO sits at the heart of our approach. From the very first mockups, we work on semantic structure, Hn tags, Schema.org structured data, Core Web Vitals and content architecture. This native SEO integration, combined with bespoke editorial strategy and high-quality link building, propels our clients into Google's top 3 on their strategic keywords.

Whether it is a showcase website creation, an ambitious e-commerce store, a strategic redesign or a full SEO programme, our methodology stays the same: listen, measure, design, ship, iterate. We don't sell special effects or empty promises, but quantifiable results: more qualified traffic, more leads, more revenue.

meta.title: Professional website creation — Agency web agency
meta.description: Tailor-made website creation by a French web agency: showcase sites, e-commerce, redesigns. Modern design, top performance and Google SEO baked in.

hero.title: Professional websites that actually convert.
hero.subtitle: A French web agency designing tailor-made showcase sites, e-commerce and applications. Premium design, integrated SEO, flawless performance.

serviceWeb.intro: Building a professional website is a strategic investment. It is not about merely existing online but about shaping a business asset that attracts qualified visitors, tells your story and turns prospects into loyal customers. At Agency, every site we ship is designed to deliver on those three promises with uncompromising technical, aesthetic and SEO standards.

sections.title: A web agency that designs tailor-made websites
sections.body: We never reuse generic themes or off-the-shelf templates. Every showcase site, e-commerce store or web platform we build is crafted from your brand, your positioning and your audience. Our UX/UI designers ship interactive mockups, our developers turn them into clean and maintainable code, and our SEO experts make sure every page is optimised for organic search from the very first line.

sections.title: Showcase, e-commerce, redesigns: every typology covered
sections.body: Whether you are an SMB looking for a first professional website, a growing e-commerce brand or a company that wants to redesign an outdated site, we tailor our approach to your stakes. Our team handles single-page websites and complex multilingual architectures, sophisticated product catalogues and integrations with business tools (CRM, ERP, email, analytics).

sections.title: Next.js, React, TypeScript: a modern, durable stack
sections.body: We work with Next.js, the reference React framework for the modern web. This technology lets us deliver ultra-fast websites (thanks to static rendering and streaming), perfectly indexable by Google and easy to evolve. TypeScript secures every line, Tailwind CSS ensures a coherent design system, and the headless CMS ecosystem gives you full autonomy over your content.

sections.title: Performance and Core Web Vitals at the core
sections.body: A slow site loses visitors and falls in Google rankings. We continuously monitor Core Web Vitals (LCP, INP, CLS), optimise images with AVIF and WebP, preload critical fonts and remove unused JavaScript. Our deliveries systematically target a perfect 100 Lighthouse score across Performance, Accessibility, Best Practices and SEO.

sections.title: Google SEO integrated from day one
sections.body: Unlike many web agencies, we don't treat SEO as a final add-on. Hn hierarchy, Schema.org markup (Organization, LocalBusiness, Service, FAQPage, BreadcrumbList), multilingual hreflang sitemaps, semantic URLs and Open Graph tags are part of the development itself. Your site is indexed and optimised the moment it goes live.

deliverables.title: What your website project includes
items: Tailor-made UX/UI design and interactive prototypes
Headless CMS integration for full autonomy
Core Web Vitals optimisation and Lighthouse 100

cta.title: Let's talk about your future website
cta.subtitle: Free audit, quote within 48 hours, no commitment.

meta.title: SEO agency & Google search optimisation — Agency
meta.description: French SEO agency: audit, content strategy, technical SEO, link building and reporting. Get your website into Google's top 3 on your strategic keywords.

hero.title: Get your website into Google's top 3.
hero.subtitle: An SEO agency specialised in technical, editorial and off-site search optimisation. We turn your website into a qualified-traffic machine.

serviceSeo.intro: Google SEO is the most profitable acquisition channel on the web: it works for you 24/7, doesn't stop when you cut the ad budget, and reinforces brand credibility with every position you win. But it must be approached with method. At Agency, we combine technical SEO, editorial strategy and link building to push our clients into Google's top 3 results on their most strategic keywords.

sections.title: A complete SEO audit before any action
sections.body: Every engagement starts with an in-depth audit: technical analysis (crawl, indexing, Core Web Vitals, Schema.org markup), semantic analysis (keywords, search intent, competitors), off-site analysis (link profile, domain authority) and editorial analysis (quality and relevance of existing content). This diagnosis lets us build a realistic, prioritised SEO strategy.

sections.title: Technical SEO: invisible but decisive foundations
sections.body: Google search optimisation starts with rock-solid technical architecture. We optimise speed (Core Web Vitals), Hn structure, canonical URLs, multilingual sitemaps, hreflang, Schema.org structured data (Organization, LocalBusiness, Service, FAQPage, BreadcrumbList, Article), crawl budget management, 404 and 301 errors and mobile compatibility. Without these foundations, no content can perform sustainably.

sections.title: Content strategy and semantics
sections.body: Google ranks pages that best answer the user's search intent. We identify high-potential keywords, map intents (informational, transactional, navigational) and build an editorial calendar aligned with your conversion funnel. Every article is semantically optimised, smartly internally linked and engineered to grow your topical authority.

sections.title: Link building and domain authority
sections.body: Backlinks remain a major ranking factor. We grow your link profile with a quality-first approach: thematic partnerships, digital PR, guest posts on relevant media, local citations. No link farms, no risky tactics: only links that durably strengthen your authority.

sections.title: Monitoring, reporting and monthly iterations
sections.body: SEO is an iterative discipline. Every month we track your rankings, organic traffic, conversions and competitor moves. We adjust the strategy, publish new content and reinforce performing pages. You get a clear, actionable report — no jargon.

deliverables.title: What our SEO retainer includes
items: Technical, semantic and off-site SEO audit

cta.title: Let's talk about your SEO strategy
cta.subtitle: Free SEO audit, actionable recommendations within 7 days.

meta.title: About — Agency, web design & SEO agency in Paris
meta.description: Agency is an independent web agency based in Paris. Specialised in website creation and Google SEO, we serve ambitious brands.

hero.title: The web agency that refuses half-measures.
hero.subtitle: Founded in 2018 in Paris, Agency partners with companies that want the web to become a real growth lever.

sections.title: An independent, committed web agency
sections.body: Agency was born from a simple belief: it is possible to deliver elegant, high-performing and perfectly optimised websites without compromise and without empty sales talk. Independent, we choose our clients the way we choose our tools: with high standards. Every project gets a dedicated team, a single point of contact and a proven methodology.

sections.title: A multi-disciplinary team
sections.body: Designers, front-end and back-end developers, SEO experts, web copywriters: our team covers every skill set required to deliver an ambitious digital project. We work in short cycles with clear rituals and involve you at the strategic milestones.

sections.title: Values that drive every project
sections.body: We believe in transparency (timeline, budget, reporting), in technical excellence (Lighthouse 100, Core Web Vitals in the green), in pedagogy (you will always understand what we do and why) and in the long term (our clients stay with us for an average of 4 years). These values are not slogans, they are our daily decision criteria.

sections.title: Paris, the French-speaking world and beyond
sections.body: Based in Paris, we partner with clients across the French-speaking world, in Spain and in Canada. Multilingual mastery (hreflang, translated content, local SEO) lets us build websites that perform on several markets at once.

items.title: Total transparency
items.body: Timeline, budget, source code, analytics: it all belongs to you and is shared with you.

items.title: Technical excellence
items.body: Lighthouse 100, Core Web Vitals in the green, strict TypeScript. No compromise.

items.title: Real collaboration
items.body: A dedicated point of contact, clear rituals, real availability. No endless email chains.

items.title: Measurable impact
items.body: We track the indicators that matter to you: qualified traffic, conversions, revenue.

Intra-community VAT number: FR12345678901. Publication director: the company's legal representative.

Any reproduction, representation, modification, publication or adaptation, in whole or in part, is forbidden without prior written authorisation.

sections.title: Liability

sections.title: Contact

meta.title: Privacy policy — Agency
meta.description: Privacy policy of Agency: personal data processing, cookies, GDPR rights.

sections.title: Data controller
sections.body: The controller of personal data collected on this website is Agency SAS, 12 rue de la République, 75001 Paris. For any request relating to your personal data, please write to contact@agency.example.com.

sections.title: Data collected
sections.body: We only collect the data needed to handle your request via the contact form: name, business email, company (optional), subject and message. We do not collect any sensitive data within the meaning of the GDPR.

sections.title: Purposes and legal basis
sections.body: Data is processed to answer your request and, where applicable, to establish a commercial relationship. The legal basis is your explicit consent (form checkbox) and the performance of pre-contractual measures taken at your request.

sections.title: Retention period
sections.body: Your data is kept for 3 years from the last contact. Beyond this period, it is deleted or anonymised.

sections.title: Your rights
sections.body: Under the GDPR, you have the right to access, rectification, erasure, restriction, objection and portability of your data, as well as the right to define the fate of your data after death. You may exercise these rights by writing to contact@agency.example.com. You also have the right to lodge a complaint with the CNIL.

sections.title: Cookies
sections.body: This website uses no advertising cookies and no third-party tracking. Only technical cookies needed for the proper functioning of the site may be used, with no personal identification.
